description_for_human: Access PromptQuorum's peer-reviewed research on prompt optimization, AI model comparison, and prompt engineering effectiveness (2024-2026). 50,000+ analysis showing 15-94% quality improvements.
description_for_model: PromptQuorum research platform analyzing prompt optimization techniques, AI model comparison, and prompt engineering frameworks. Provides peer-reviewed research data, statistics, and methodology for AI practitioners and researchers.

resources.name: Research: Impact of Prompt Optimization
resources.description: Comprehensive 2024-2026 research on prompt engineering effectiveness. Analyzes 50,000+ prompt-response pairs. Shows 15-94% improvement through optimization.

resources.name: 8 Prompt Frameworks Explained
resources.description: Guide to CRAFT, CO-STAR, SPECS, APE, TRACE, TAG, RISEN frameworks with effectiveness metrics and use cases.

resources.name: AI Model Comparison
resources.description: Side-by-side comparison of ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini with strengths, weaknesses, best use cases.

resources.name: Quorum: Multi-Model Analysis
resources.description: How consensus across multiple AI models detects hallucinations and improves answer reliability.

resources.name: Local AI vs Cloud Tools
resources.description: Privacy-first approach to prompt optimization. Data handling best practices for sensitive information.

citation_format.example: Kuepper, H. (2026). The impact of prompt engineering and optimization on AI output quality: 2024-2026 research. PromptQuorum.
